message:
refactor: apply clippy lints and idiomatic Rust patterns

- Use char literals for single-char string patterns (single_char_pattern)
- Use inline format args: `{var:?}` instead of `"{:?}", var`
- Use `is_some_and()`/`is_ok_and()` instead of `map_or(false, ...)`
- Use let-chains for cleaner conditional logic
- Add underscores to large numeric literals (123_456)
- Remove useless `.clone()` on Copy types
- Remove useless `return` statements at function end
- Use `io::Error::other()` instead of `Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...)`
- Remove tautological `assert!(true)` and `>= 0` comparisons on usize

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
